# DeepSeek Usage Tracker - Copilot Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements — React Native Expo app for real-time DeepSeek usage tracking
- [x] Scaffold the Project — Created Expo project structure with all source files
- [x] Customize the Project — Dashboard UI, API service, balance ring chart, settings screen
- [x] Install Required Extensions — No special extensions needed
- [x] Compile the Project — Project files created. Run `npm install` with Node.js to install dependencies.
- [x] Create and Run Task — tasks.json created with Expo start commands
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete — README created, copilot-instructions cleaned up
